sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n32782" key="e)/kptucis" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἔκπτυξις</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">εως</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n32782.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">spreading, parting</tr_> of the legs in riding, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0718.tlg003:7" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Aët.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">3.7</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
